enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nalam Vazha, the protagonist expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting on the beauty of life and relationships. The song is woven into the narrative of Marupadiyum, where it underscores the complexities of love and the desire for connection. With its soothing melody and poignant lyrics, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. The collaboration between SPB and Ilaiyaraaja elevates the song, making it a cherished piece in Tamil music history.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nalam Vazha from the Marupadiyum movie is a timeless classic that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the mesmerizing voice of SPB and the enchanting composition by Ilaiyaraaja, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet moments of romance. Dive into the lyrical brilliance of Vaali and let the soothing melodies take you on an emotional journey.
stanzaMeanings: May good fortune come, my greetings will echo in Tamil, my words will resonate.
If the gentle breeze comes to your door, it will sing upon you.
May good fortune come, my greetings will echo in Tamil, my words will resonate.
Sometimes, people can change their colors. Their minds and qualities can also change.
Sometimes, art can be childish, but the love expressed in writing should not be wrong...
I will nurture what has grown beyond the fingers, and I will also nurture the cities...
What sorrow is there in this? Oh, little bird...
May good fortune come, my greetings will echo in Tamil, my words will resonate.
In the east, the day begins with a sound. What is forgotten will also be remembered...
In the seas, the waves rise, and the value will also rise...
Trusting the moon, there are no nights, the lights will show the boundaries of brightness.
God will close one door and open another...
May good fortune come, my greetings will echo in Tamil, my words will resonate.
If the gentle breeze comes to your door, it will sing upon you.
May good fortune come, my greetings will echo in Tamil, my words will resonate.
